# Add all 3 current themes to Neo.examples.ConfigurationViewport

@mxmrtns 

I will add all 3 themes to the `src/DefaultConfig` and update the `ConfigurationViewport` switchTheme buttons (both) to toggle through all themes. Meaning: we no longer need to manually change example config.json files to see the new neo-light theme.

Toggle order: light => dark => neo-light
